archiveRecord.description: ArchiveRecord Resource if the result is archived. This is null if the result is not archived.

createdAt.description: DateTime at which the the result was created

creator.description: UserSummary Resource of who created the request

entryId.description: ID of the entry that this result is attached to

fieldValidation.description: Object mapping field names to a UserValidation Resource object for that field. To **set** validation for a result, you *must* use this object.

fields.description: Field values for the returned result. Please note the keys of each field are the field's system name (additional_prop) instead of the field's display name (additionalProp).

isReviewed.description: Whether or not this result is attached to an accepted entry

modifiedAt.description: DateTime at which the the result was last modified

projectId.description: ID of the project to insert the result into

schema.description: Schema that the result belongs to
schema.title: SchemaProperty
